data.label: React Native MMKV
data.description: MMKV 是一个高效的小型移动键值存储框架，由微信开发。react-native-mmkv 是一个库，允许您通过快速和直接的 JS 绑定使用 MMKV，轻松在 React Native 应用中使用。

data.label: React Native MMKV
data.description: MMKV is an efficient, small mobile key-value storage framework developed by WeChat. react-native-mmkv is a library that allows you to easily use MMKV inside your React Native app through fast and direct JS bindings to the native C++ library.
